decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 7/10 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 12 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 83/3181 lines reworked (2.6%, 23/50). 0/33 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 4.5% (5/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 36. Session 8: 33 (process:20 efficiency:10 ttfw:3). Session 9: 42 (process:20 efficiency:16 ttfw:6). Session 10: 42 (process:20 efficiency:15 ttfw:7). Session 11: 30 (process:20 efficiency:8 ttfw:2). Session 12: 34 (process:20 efficiency:13 ttfw:1).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 247/247 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters use 2 different interfaces. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
